name: engineering-workflow
description: Engineering workflow skills for project setup, requirements, diagnosis, incidents, prototyping, slicing, architecture, coding, testing, handoff, and delivery.

interface.shortDescription: Project setup, requirements, debugging, prototyping, coding, testing, and delivery workflows.
interface.longDescription: Engineering Workflow groups project-engineering skills for project setup, requirement alignment, diagnosis, incident debugging, prototyping, issue slicing, architecture review, language-agnostic implementation standards, test policy, engineering handoff, and verification delivery. Runtime artifacts default to .codex/engineering-workflow/ in the target repository. It does not define or override Codex runtime abilities such as sub-agent lifecycle management.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use the Engineering Workflow skills to handle this project task with project context, requirements alignment, implementation discipline, testing, and verification.
